---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in Elemental Siege
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Platform

- [ ] iOS
- [ ] Mac

## Environment

- **Unity Version:** 6000.0.23f1
- **OS Version:** (e.g., macOS 15.2, iOS 18.1)
- **Device:** (e.g., iPhone 16, MacBook Pro M3)
- **Game Version/Build:** (e.g., v1.0.0, commit hash)

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain the problem.

## Severity

- [ ] **Critical** — Game crashes or data loss
- [ ] **Major** — Feature broken, no workaround
- [ ] **Minor** — Feature broken, workaround exists
- [ ] **Cosmetic** — Visual or UI issue

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (logs, console output, etc.).
